name: Macy's American Express® Card
effective_cost: Free, with no annual fee, but the everyday earning rate depends heavily on which Star Rewards tier you're in

verdict.text: Only strong for frequent Macy's shoppers who reach Platinum status

earn_rates.category: Macy's & macys.com: Platinum tier only ($1,200+ in annual card spend), every day with no merchandise exclusions
Macy's & macys.com: Silver (default) and Gold ($500–$1,199/yr) tiers, only during scheduled bonus days rather than every purchase

earn_note: This is the open-loop American Express version of Macy's card: it earns outside Macy's, unlike the closed-loop, store-only Macy's Credit Card, which only works at Macy's and Macy's Backstage. Star Rewards status is use-it-or-lose-it and resets based on trailing 12-month spend: Silver is the automatic starting tier and only earns points on Macy's-designated "Star Money Days," not on everyday purchases; Gold ($500–$1,199/yr) works the same way; only Platinum ($1,200+/yr) converts to a flat 5% back on every Macy's purchase with no exclusions. The 3%/2%/1% non-Macy's rates come from the Amex network side and don't appear to vary by tier.

redemption_options.method: Star Money statement credit / merchandise certificate at Macy's, issued from accumulated points

points.per_100k: $1,000 in Star Money, but only accessible if points are actually being earned (i.e., you've reached Platinum, or it's a Star Money Day)
points.note: 1,000 points = $10 in Star Money. Star Money expires 30 days after issuance, so it has to be used quickly rather than banked. This isn't a flexible cash-back currency; it's spendable at Macy's/macys.com only.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners: Star Money redeems only at Macy's and macys.com.

insurance.detail: Not confirmed on Citi's or Macy's public product pages for this card
Not confirmed on Citi's or Macy's public product pages for this card

protection_note: Despite running on the American Express network, this is a Citi-issued retail co-brand, not a standard Amex-issued card. The usual Amex purchase-protection/extended-warranty suite is not confirmed to apply. Treat this as a rewards-and-financing card with no meaningful insurance, not a card to rely on for large purchases.
rental_note: No rental car coverage found for this card.

status_perks.name: Star Rewards tiers
status_perks.note: Silver (default) → Gold ($500+/yr) → Platinum ($1,200+/yr), reassessed on a rolling basis. Only Platinum earns every-day rewards on Macy's spend; lower tiers mostly earn on special Star Money Days.

services.name: No foreign transaction fees on the store card; 3% on the Amex version
services.detail: This open-loop Amex version charges a 3% foreign transaction fee on purchases made outside the US, a real cost if you'd use it while traveling.

services.name: Special financing offers
services.detail: Deferred-interest/promotional financing periodically offered on qualifying Macy's purchases. Using it can affect reward-earning on that purchase; check current terms before financing.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns rewards on their spend (into your account)
No dedicated insurance to share: this card doesn't carry a confirmed protection suite

additional_cards.note: Free to add, useful mainly for pooling a household's Macy's spend toward reaching Platinum tier faster.

timeline.text: Macy's/Citi (via Department Stores National Bank, a Citi subsidiary) issue two distinct card products: the closed-loop, store-only Macy's Credit Card (Star Rewards only, unusable outside Macy's/Backstage) and this open-loop Macy's American Express Card (same Star Rewards structure at Macy's, plus 3%/2%/1% elsewhere). Confirm which one you're comparing; they are not the same card.
